## Runtime.RuntimeContext.findRecipesUsingIngredient() method

Finds all recipes that use a specific ingredient.

**Signature:**

```typescript
findRecipesUsingIngredient(ingredientId: IngredientId): Result<RuntimeRecipe[]>;
```
